description: Hack the partition wall between the converted-balcony study and the living room to open up the space
Remove the reinforced concrete column at the corner of the study to widen the opening
Drill into the household shelter wall to mount a storage shelf
Raise the master bathroom floor by 80mm with cement screed to create a walk-in shower kerb
Install a plaster false ceiling with cove lighting in the living room
Repaint all bedroom walls and replace bedroom door
